meaning: n.软管,水龙带,长筒袜v.用软管浇水
examples: You've left the garden hose on.
Mrs. Morrell reached for a loop of garden hose.
Water in the engine compartment is sucked away by a hose.
Marcel Bich, for example, the Bic pen pioneer, blundered into panty hose and perfume.
Instead, we sweep our front walks, hose off our porches, shake out our shoes and sneakers.
